activity.description: A player is about to shoot. In the background, we can see the goalkeeper, and to the left, two defenders. They are playing on a grass field.
activity.open_question: Look at the image. Describe what is happening in your own words. What do you think will happen next?

questions.sentence: The player with the ball is preparing to __________ towards the goal.
In the background, we can see the goalkeeper ready to make a __________.
The match is taking place on a __________ field.
To the left of the image, there are two __________ trying to stop the attack.
